title: Differential Privacy: Privacy-Preserving Analytics
author: Aspen Cruz
Privacy Engineer
description: Add noise to protect individual privacy—but utility degrades with strong guarantees
content:
Differential privacy provides mathematical privacy guarantees by adding calibrated noise.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Privacy Paradox (2037)](/docs/articles/privacy-paradox-2037)
